All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
BuildingFromScratchExample
Complex usage example demonstrating building JSON from scratch.
DomainMappingExample
Example demonstrating how to map JSON to Domain objects without Reflection, Setters, or DTOs.
Fallback
JSON decorator that returns a fallback value if a key or index is missing.
FileReadingExample
 
Formatted
Formatted JSON decorator.
ImmutableTreeUpdateExample
Ultra complex example demonstrating immutable tree updates on deeply nested JSON.
Json
Core interface for representing a JSON entity.
JsonArray
JSON array representation.
JsonBool
JSON boolean representation.
JsonNull
JSON null representation.
JsonNumber
JSON number representation.
JsonObject
JSON object representation.
JsonString
JSON string representation.
JsonUser
JSON implementation of a User.
Main
Main entry point.
Parsed
Parsed JSON from a string.
ParsedStream
JSON parsed from an InputStream.
SimpleExample
Simple usage example demonstrating basic JSON parsing and value extraction.
Strict
JSON decorator that fails fast if a key or index is not found.
User
Domain interface representing a User.
With
JSON with an added key-value pair.
Without
JSON without a specific key.
